name: Bunny CDN
description: Bunny CDN is a content delivery network that provides fast global content distribution, edge storage, DNS management, and cache purging. It offers a simple API for managing pull zones, storage zones, and cached content.

capabilities.name: create_pull_zone
capabilities.description: Create a new CDN pull zone that caches and delivers content from your origin server. Configure caching rules, SSL, and edge locations.

capabilities.name: list_pull_zones
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all CDN pull zones in your account with their configuration, traffic stats, and status.

capabilities.name: purge_cache
capabilities.description: Purge cached content from the CDN edge servers. You can purge an entire pull zone or specific URLs to force content refresh.

capabilities.name: create_storage_zone
capabilities.description: Create a new edge storage zone for hosting files directly on Bunny's global network. Useful for static assets, media, and downloads.

capabilities.name: get_statistics
capabilities.description: Retrieve bandwidth usage, request counts, cache hit ratios, and other traffic statistics for your CDN pull zones.

capabilities.name: add_custom_hostname
capabilities.description: Add a custom hostname (domain) to a pull zone and configure SSL. Bunny automatically provisions and renews free SSL certificates.
